## Feature Summary

Provide a concise description of the proposed feature.

## Problem Statement

What problem would this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the proposed solution.

## Operational Benefit

How would this improve mission planning, autonomy, risk analysis, or decision support?

## Additional Context

Include diagrams, references, or examples if available.
